description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with three stages: compile-frontend, build-index, and deploy. In the compile-frontend stage add a compile:polymer job using the costrouc/polymer-cli:1.6.0 image that runs `bower --allow-root install` then `polymer build` and stores the resulting build/ directory as an artifact. In the build-index stage add a build:index job using the python:3.6 image that runs `python scripts/site-generator.py` and saves the build/ directory as an artifact. In the deploy stage add a build:frontend job that runs on the docker:git image with a docker:dind service, triggers only on tags, and executes `docker login -u gitlab-ci-token -p $CI_BUILD_TOKEN $CI_REGISTRY`, `docker build -t $CI_REGISTRY/$CI_PROJECT_PATH:$CI_COMMIT_TAG .`, and `docker push $CI_REGISTRY/$CI_PROJECT_PATH:$CI_COMMIT_TAG`. Also in the deploy stage add a pages job that runs only on the master branch, echoes a message, creates a public directory, copies the built es5-bundled files into public/, and publishes the public/ directory as a GitLab Pages artifact.
